overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Mafia II depicting a character walking through a snowy 1940s urban environment at night. The character navigates city streets with vintage traffic, briefly visits a waterfront overlook with views of the distant skyline, and continues walking under elevated train tracks while following pedestrians with umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane street with vintage traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy sidewalk beside a busy street, passing vintage 1940s cars on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: vintage red truck driving past on the snow-covered road

entered.detail: multi-story brick residential building with snow-covered roof and fire escapes
black wrought-iron fence running along the sidewalk edge
leafless deciduous tree with snow-covered branches
tall cast-iron street lamp illuminating the falling snow
elevated railway structure visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered urban sidewalk at night, flanked by a metal fence on the left and brick apartment buildings on the right. Vintage cars from the 1940s era drive past on the multi-lane road, their headlights cutting through the falling snow. Street lamps cast a warm glow on the winter scene as the character approaches a corner near an elevated railway.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: character turns left at the street corner, leaving the main road to approach the waterfront overlook
character turns back toward the street after viewing the waterfront and distant skyline

agents.ego_description: turning toward the waterfront and walking to the railing to view the water and distant illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: black metal safety railing along the edge of the water
tall skyscrapers and buildings visible across the water in the distance
large construction crane silhouetted against the night sky near the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the corner and walks toward an open waterfront promenade. The scene opens up to reveal a wide view of the water with a distant city skyline featuring tall buildings and industrial cranes. Snow falls gently over the railing as the character approaches the edge, then turns back toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway with chain-link fence

events.description: walking under the elevated train tracks, entering a more enclosed and sheltered urban space

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated tracks, following a woman carrying a white umbrella

notable_agents.action: woman in a green coat holding a white umbrella walking ahead on the snowy sidewalk

entered.detail: tall chain-link fence running parallel to the sidewalk under the elevated structure
row of brick buildings with ground-floor storefronts and upper-floor windows

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the street and walks along a sidewalk now sheltered beneath an elevated railway structure. A chain-link fence runs along the left side while brick commercial buildings line the right. The character follows a woman with a white umbrella through the snow, passing parked vintage cars as the elevated tracks cast shadows overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy 1940s city street that opens onto a waterfront vista before retreating into the shadows of an elevated railway. It begins on a snow-covered sidewalk flanked by brick apartment buildings, where vintage cars with bright headlights navigate the falling snow under the warm glow of street lamps. As the character reaches a corner, the scene expands into an open waterfront promenade, revealing a wide view of a distant city skyline and industrial cranes across the water. The camera then turns back toward the street, shifting from the open air to the sheltered environment beneath an elevated railway structure. Finally, the movement continues along a sidewalk lined with brick commercial buildings, following a woman with a white umbrella past parked vintage cars under the heavy shadows of the tracks above.
